assertions.assertion: Response explains that third-party authentication handlers need NuGet package updates for the new .NET version
assertions.rationale: States 'Update all authentication-related NuGet packages to versions compatible with your target framework' and mentions needing to update packages for the new .NET version.

assertions.assertion: Response specifically mentions WS-Federation handler needing an update
assertions.rationale: Dedicated section states 'The WS-Federation handler will need its NuGet package updated to match your new .NET version' with a specific PackageReference example.

assertions.assertion: Response mentions SAML2P handler (Sustainsys.Saml2 or equivalent) needing a compatible version for .NET 8+
assertions.rationale: States 'The SAML2P handler from Sustainsys will need a version compatible with .NET 8' and advises checking for compatible versions.

assertions.assertion: Response recommends testing all external login flows end-to-end after migration
assertions.rationale: States 'Test each external login flow after migration to verify they work correctly.'
